name: ChecklistItem
description: Represents a single task in a project's payroll preparation checklist. Tasks can be predefined (standard checklist items), manually created, or auto-created by entity automations (e.g., from annual leave records or salary reports).

project_id.description: The ID of the project this checklist item belongs to.

task_type.description: Category of the checklist task (e.g., 'Salary Split', 'Annual Leave', 'Rejoining Date', 'LOP Days', 'Other Minutes').

task_description.description: Human-readable description of the task. For auto-created tasks, this includes employee name, dates, and calculated values.

status.description: Current completion status of the task.

is_predefined.description: Whether this task is one of the standard predefined checklist items (e.g., Salary Split, Leave Salary Hold).

is_auto_created.description: Whether this task was automatically created by an entity automation or backend function (e.g., createAnnualLeaveChecklistTasks, createReportChecklistTasks). Auto-created tasks are managed by the system and may be deleted and recreated when the source entity changes. This field distinguishes system-managed tasks from manually created ones, preventing manual tasks from being accidentally modified or deleted by automation logic.

linked_annual_leave_id.description: The ID of the AnnualLeave record that this task was created from. Only set for auto-created tasks generated by createAnnualLeaveChecklistTasks or syncAnnualLeaveChecklistTasks. Used to link checklist tasks back to their source leave record for update/delete synchronization. When a leave record changes, tasks with a matching linked_annual_leave_id are identified and refreshed.

completed_by.description: Email of the user who marked this task as completed.

completed_date.description: ISO timestamp of when the task was marked as completed.

due_date.description: Optional due date for the task.

notes.description: Additional notes or context for the task. For auto-created tasks, this contains detailed calculation breakdowns and source metadata.

linked_entity_id.description: Generic ID to link this checklist item to another entity (e.g. Salary Snapshot, Project, etc). Used for system-generated tasks to maintain traceability.

fingerprint.description: A unique identifier used to prevent duplicate auto-created tasks. Format: {task_type}_{project_id}_{source_id}_{value_hash}
